recalls.Description: Bicystar is recalling its children's high chairs due to serious safety concerns. These gray high chairs feature a metal frame, metal legs, a tray, and a cushioned seat cover. The name "BICYSTAR" is displayed on the front of the tray, while the model number "TB-HC6900" can be found on a label stitched to the back of the seat cover. The chairs do not meet mandatory safety standards due to the absence of an essential crotch restraint, which increases the risk of falls and entrapment for children.
recalls.Title: Bicystar High Chairs Recalled for Fall and Entrapment Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Bicystar Store via email at bicystarhighchair@outlook.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Bicystar High Chair - model TB-HC6900
"BICYSTAR" and "Model No.: TB-HC6900" are printed on labels stitched to the back of the recalled Bicystar high chair seat cover

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from September 1, 2025, to September 30, 2025, priced around $76.

Distributors.Name: Hebei Beihong Kejiyouxiangongsi, dba Bicystar Group Co., Ltd. and Bicystar Store, of China

recalls.metaDescription: Bicystar recalls high chairs due to serious fall and entrapment risks. Contact for refunds and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Rotinyard has announced a recall of convertible baby high chairs available in beige or pink, featuring a removable seat cushion, detachable tray, and footrest. These high chairs can also transform into an infant swing and are designed to be reclinable and collapsible. The product number HA-028 can be found on a tracking label located on the seatback.
recalls.Title: Convertible Baby High Chairs Recalled for Fall and Entrapment Hazards; Sold by Rotinyard on Amazon
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to Rotinyard via email at trailblazeramz@outlook.com for assistance.

Images.Caption: Recalled High Chair in different modes
Tracking label on the seatback showing "Product No.: HA-028"

Retailers.Name: Available for purchase online at Amazon.com from March 2025 to June 2025 for approximately $90.

Hazards.Name: The recalled high chairs do not meet mandatory safety standards as they lack the necessary attached restraint system, creating a serious fall risk for infants. Additionally, there is a risk of a child's head becoming trapped between the seat and tray, leading to potential entrapment.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must cease using the recalled high chairs immediately and contact Rotinyard for a complete refund. To process the refund, consumers should disassemble the high chairs, cut the restraints and fabric seat cushion insert, then email photos of the destroyed items to trailblazeramz@outlook.com. A full refund will be issued upon receipt of the photos.

recalls.metaDescription: Rotinyard recalls convertible baby high chairs due to serious fall and entrapment hazards. Contact for refunds and safety actions.

recalls.Description: Harppa has issued a recall for their 5-in-1 convertible high chairs, specifically Model BHC001, due to serious safety concerns. These high chairs, which can transform into various seating options, were sold without the necessary restraint system, increasing the risk of falls. Additionally, there is a dangerous entrapment hazard where a child's head may become caught between the seat and the tray. This recall affects high chairs marked with 'Model Number BHC001' and 'Production Batch Number 202408'. They were available in green, pink, and gray colors.
recalls.Title: Harppa 5-in-1 Convertible High Chairs Recalled Due to Fall and Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should stop using the recalled high chairs and reach out to Harppa at 844-796-8168 from 10 a.m. to 7 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. Alternatively, they can email recall@harppababy.com or visit https://harppababy.com/pages/2025-harppa-high-chair-model-bhc001-voluntary-recall and click 'Recall' for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Harppa 5-in-1 Convertible High Chair

Retailers.Name: Available on Walmart.com from August 2024 through July 2025, priced between $60 and $80.

Hazards.Name: Fall and entrapment hazards due to lack of proper restraint system and design flaws.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should contact Harppa for a replacement high chair and follow specific disposal instructions for the recalled product.

recalls.metaDescription: Harppa recalls 5-in-1 convertible high chairs due to serious fall and entrapment hazards. Contact for replacement and disposal instructions.

recalls.Description: Peg Perego is recalling its Tatamia 3-in-1 recliners, swings, and high chairs due to a risk of suffocation. These versatile products transition from a recliner to a high chair and an unpowered infant swing. They are available in the 'Ice' (gray) color and feature the model number IMTATANA01BL73. The brand name 'Peg Perego' is displayed on the top of the padded leather seat and on the front of the tray in high chair mode. Only units manufactured on or after June 23, 2022, and purchased on or after November 12, 2022, are affected by this recall. The manufacture date and model number can be found on the base of the item.
recalls.Title: Peg Perego Recalls Tatamia 3-in-1 Recliners, Swings, and High Chairs Due to Suffocation Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach Peg Perego at 877-737-3464 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email service@pegperego.com, or visit https://www.pegperego.com/en_us/baby/recalls.

Products.Name: Peg Perego Tatamia 3-in-1 Recliners, Swings, and High Chairs

Images.Caption: Recalled Peg Perego Tatamia 3-in-1 in High Chair Mode
Recalled Peg Perego Tatamia 3-in-1 in Swing Mode
Recalled Peg Perego Tatamia 3-in-1 in Recliner Mode
Label with Date of Manufacture and Model Number Found on Base of Product

Retailers.Name: Available online at PegPerego.com, Amazon.com, Target.com, and other retailers from November 2022 through January 2025, priced around $450.

Importers.Name: Peg Perego USA Inc., of Fort Wayne, Indiana

Hazards.Name: Suffocation risk due to incline angle exceeding 10 degrees and marketing for infant sleep, violating safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the recalled items and contact Peg Perego for a full refund, including a prepaid shipping label for returns.

recalls.metaDescription: Peg Perego recalls Tatamia 3-in-1 products due to suffocation risks. Contact for refunds and return details.

recalls.Description: Bugaboo has issued a recall for its Giraffe high chairs, which stand approximately 30 inches tall, 21 inches wide, and 23 inches long. These high chairs were available in various colors, including blue, black, natural wood/white, warm wood/gray, and white, each identified by specific item codes located on the underside of the seat. The item codes are as follows: Blue (200008005), Black (200008004), Neutral Wood/White (200008002), Warm Wood/Gray (200008003), and White (200008001).
recalls.Title: Bugaboo Giraffe High Chairs Recalled Due to Fall Hazard Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach the Bugaboo Service Team at 800-460-2922 from 7 a.m. to 4 p.m. PT Monday through Thursday and 7 a.m. to 1 p.m. PT Friday. They can also email service.us@bugaboo.com or visit https://service.bugaboo.com/s/bugaboo-giraffe-recall-repair-kit-checker?language=en_US&Country=US or www.bugaboo.com and click on 'Product Recalls' for further details.

Products.Name: Bugaboo Giraffe High Chair
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 18,280 (In addition, about 2,325 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Bugaboo Giraffe High Chair
Location of item code on label

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 22 reports of the legs of the chair detaching, including 13 reports of minor injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available at Nordstrom and other specialty retailers nationwide, as well as online at www.bugaboo.com and www.Amazon.com from May 2023 to April 2025 for approximately $380.

Importers.Name: Bugaboo North America Inc., of New York

Hazards.Name: Fall hazard leading to serious injury or death due to potential leg detachment

Remedies.Name: Stop using the high chairs and contact Bugaboo for a free repair kit with an Allen key and new screws.

recalls.metaDescription: Bugaboo recalls Giraffe high chairs due to fall hazards. Contact Bugaboo for a free repair kit and safety information.

recalls.Description: Funlio is recalling its 2-in-1 Convertible Baby High Chairs, which can transform into a chair and table for growing children. These high chairs are made from natural wood and feature a removable padded seat insert with a green forest design. The brand name 'Funlio' is displayed on the front of the chair and on a tracking label found beneath the tray, which also indicates 'Model FL-039'.
recalls.Title: Recall of Funlio Convertible High Chairs Due to Fall and Entrapment Risks; Non-Compliance with Federal Safety Standards
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled high chairs, disassemble them, and reach out to Ecogoods for details on obtaining a full refund. For assistance, contact Ecogoods at 800-251-8805 from 5:30 p.m. to 1:30 a.m. PT, Sunday through Thursday, or via email at funlioproductrecall@outlook.com. More information is available at https://funliotoys.com/pages/product-recalls or by visiting https://funliotoys.com and selecting 'Product Recalls' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled 2-in-1 Funlio Convertible Baby High Chair
Recalled 2-in-1 Funlio Convertible Baby High Chair with forest-themed padded seat
Tracking label under the tray

Retailers.Name: Available for purchase at Amazon.com and Walmart.com between March 2024 and March 2025, priced around $100.

Distributors.Name: Shanghai Balejiao E-commerce Co. Ltd., d/b/a Ecogoods, of China

Hazards.Name: Entrapment and fall hazards due to inadequate safety features, violating federal high chair safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Discontinue use, disassemble the chair, and contact Ecogoods for a full refund. Cut the restraint straps and send photos of the disassembled chair to funlioproductrecall@outlook.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Funlio recalls convertible high chairs due to serious fall and entrapment risks. Immediate action required for a full refund.

recalls.Description: Costway is recalling its Babyjoy 6-in-1 Convertible High Chair Activity Centers due to serious safety concerns. These products, available in beige (model BB5693YW) and gray (model BB5693GR), feature a removable adjustable tray, a removable seat cushion, adjustable-height legs, and a mesh storage pocket. The seat padding in the stationary mode is white with multicolored dots, and 'Babyjoy' is printed on the front of the tray. The model number can be found on the packaging.
recalls.Title: Costway Recalls Babyjoy 6-in-1 Convertible High Chair Activity Centers Due to Entrapment Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact Costway at 844-242-1885, available from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, or email recall@costway.com. More information is available at www.costway.com/recall-high-chair-activity-centers or by visiting www.costway.com and clicking 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Babyjoy 6-in-1 Convertible High Chair Activity Centers

Images.Caption: Recalled Babyjoy high chair activity center
Recalled Babyjoy high chair activity center - beige
Recalled Babyjoy high chair activity center - gray

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Walmart.com from November 2023 through January 2025 for approximately $27

Hazards.Name: Entrapment hazard due to wide leg openings and tray disengagement risk

Remedies.Name: Full refund and return instructions from Costway

recalls.metaDescription: Costway recalls Babyjoy 6-in-1 Convertible High Chair Activity Centers due to serious entrapment hazards. Contact for refunds and returns.

recalls.Description: HONEYJOY COMPANY is recalling several models of its high chairs, which are made from metal and plastic with cloth seats available in various colors and prints. These products may pose a suffocation risk as they were marketed for infant sleep and have an incline angle exceeding 10 degrees, violating federal safety regulations. The models affected by this recall include various configurations of convertible and foldable high chairs designed for babies and toddlers. Each chair features a sewn-in label indicating the model number and manufacturing date on the top cover of the seat.
recalls.Title: HONEYJOY Recalls Convertible and Foldable High Chairs Due to Suffocation Hazard and Regulatory Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should cease using the recalled high chairs immediately and reach out to HONEYJOY via email at honeyjoyrecall@hotmail.com. For further details, visit https://www.amazon.com/stores/page/A401562A-3E1E-43A1-8F23-3AAE28BA14FC?ingress=2&visitId=596d5ffc-9ec0-4624-baae-6aad8d0c70dd&store_ref=bl_ast_dp_brandLogo_sto&ref_=ast_bln or www.amazon.com/stores/page/3AD84AC7-8A2C-402F-B205-F6D434FA6C53, then click "MORE" and select "RECALL HIGH CHAIR" for additional information.

Images.Caption: Recalled HONEYJOY 3-in-1 Infant Swing, High Chair and Booster Seat model BE10019US-GR in gray
Recalled HONEYJOY 3-in-1 Infant Swing, High Chair and Booster Seat model BE10019US-PI in pink
Recalled HONEYJOY High Chair model AD10025PI in pink
Recalled HONEYJOY Convertible High Chair model AD1004BE in beige
Recalled HONEYJOY 5-in-1 Convertible High Chair model BB4640BL in blue

Recalled HONEYJOY Foldable High Chair AD10014BE in beige with "Forest Friends" decoration.
Sewn-in Label with Model Number and Date of Manufacture

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Amazon.com from April 2023 to August 2024, priced between $79 and $220.

Hazards.Name: Suffocation risk due to improper marketing for infant sleep and incline angle exceeding safety standards.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled high chairs, contact HONEYJOY for a full refund, and follow disposal instructions provided.

recalls.metaDescription: HONEYJOY recalls high chairs due to suffocation risks. Stop using immediately and contact for a full refund.

recalls.Description: Costway is recalling all Babyjoy high chairs due to serious safety concerns. These collapsible high chairs, available in pink (model BB5656PI), beige (model BB5656BE), and gray (model BB5656GR), feature a footrest, a detachable tray, and a cushioned seat adorned with stars. The design includes four static wheels with locks and allows for height and recline adjustments. Notably, 'Babyjoy' is printed on the detachable tray, while 'Goplus Corp.' can be found on a label on the back of the seat. The model number is indicated on the product packaging.
recalls.Title: Costway Recalls Babyjoy High Chairs Due to Safety Risks of Entrapment and Suffocation
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can reach Costway at 844-242-1885 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, email recall@costway.com, or visit https://www.costway.com/recall-high-chair or www.costway.com and click on recall.

Images.Caption: Recalled Babyjoy high chair model BB5656PI
Recalled Babyjoy high chair model BB5656BE
Recalled Babyjoy high chair model BB5656GR

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com, Walmart.com, Costway.com, and Shein.com from November 2022 through November 2024, priced between $70 and $110.

Distributors.Name: Goplus Corporation, dba Costway, of Fontana, California

recalls.metaDescription: Costway recalls Babyjoy high chairs due to suffocation and entrapment hazards. Stop using immediately for a full refund.

recalls.Description: MJKSARE high chairs, specifically model H-601, are being recalled due to safety concerns. These high chairs feature green padding and a folding design, with a front tray that includes a small cup holder. Each chair has a tag on the underside of the seat padding indicating the manufacture date in the format 'MM/YYYY.' All production dates are part of this recall.
recalls.Title: MJKSARE High Chairs Recalled for Safety Risks: Entrapment and Fall Hazards Identified
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to TONGAO via email at gztaamz@163.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled MJKSARE High Chair
Back view of MJKSARE baby high chair
Sideview of MJKSARE baby high chair
Recalled MJKSARE high chairs packaging
Tag on seat cover of the recalled high chairs with date of manufacture and model number

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from February 2024 to March 2024 for approximately $70.

Hazards.Name: Entrapment risk due to wide leg openings and potential fall hazard from disengaged tray.

Remedies.Name: Immediately cease use of the high chair and contact TONGAO for disposal instructions and a full refund. Amazon will notify all known buyers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: MJKSARE high chairs recalled due to entrapment and fall hazards. Contact TONGAO for refunds and disposal instructions.

recalls.Description: Clark Associates is recalling 12 models of Lancaster Table & Seating Standard Height Plastic Restaurant High Chairs due to a potential fall hazard. These high chairs, available in brown, black, or gray, were sold either fully assembled or as ready-to-assemble kits, with or without wheels. The item number can be found on the warning label located on the back of the seatback. The affected models include various configurations of high chairs with trays and wheels as well as those without wheels.
recalls.Title: Clark Associates Issues Recall for Lancaster Table & Seating Plastic Restaurant High Chairs Due to Fall Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to Clark Associates at 800-285-8172, available from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. They can also email highchairs@lancastertableandseating.com or visit https://www.lancastertableandseating.com/recalls/plastic-high-chairs-recall for more details.

Products.Name: Lancaster Table & Seating Black Plastic Highchair with Tray and Wheels, assembled
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 27,140 (In addition, about 69 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled High Chair (Black)
Recalled High Chair (Black)
Recalled High Chair (Brown)
Recalled High Chair (Gray)
Location of Model Number

Injuries.Name: The firm has received nine reports of the T-bar located at the front of the chair coming loose or breaking off. Two injuries have been reported, including one report of a child falling out of the high chair, resulting in minor scrapes and bruises.

Retailers.Name: The Restaurant Store nationwide and online at www.therestaurantstore.com

Importers.Name: Clark Core Services LLC, d/b/a Clark Associates, of Lancaster, Pennsylvania

Hazards.Name: The T-bar at the front middle of the chair may loosen and detach, creating a fall risk for children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the recalled high chairs immediately and contact Clark Associates for a full refund. It is advised to register the product online at https://www.lancastertableandseating.com/recalls/plastic-high-chairs-recall and dispose of the item according to local recycling regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Clark Associates recalls Lancaster Table & Seating high chairs due to fall hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.

recalls.Description: The recall affects SINGES 3-in-1 Baby High Chairs and Booster Seats, which feature a light blue cushioned seat, detachable legs, and an adjustable tray that can be transformed into a booster seat. These high chairs were available in blue and red colors and have been found to violate safety regulations. Concerns include inadequate restraint systems and stability issues that may lead to tipping or collapsing, posing a fall risk to children.
recalls.Title: SINGES 3-in-1 High Chairs and Booster Seats Recalled for Fall Hazard Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact Shenzhen Yingjieshang Trade at 206-458-7003 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email at szyjsmygswfs@outlook.com. Visit www.singes-online.com/faq-75.html or go to www.singes-online.com and click on 'Recall' for further details.

Products.Name: SINGES 3-in-1 Baby High Chairs and Booster Seats

Images.Caption: Recalled SINGES 3-in-1 Baby High Chair and Booster Seat

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Walmart.com from February 2020 to December 2021 for approximately $75.

Importers.Name: Shenzhen Yingjieshang Trade Co Ltd,, of China

Hazards.Name: Fall hazard due to safety regulation violations

Remedies.Name: Return to Walmart for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: SINGES 3-in-1 High Chairs recalled due to fall hazards. Stop using immediately and return for a full refund.

recalls.Description: Brandline has announced a recall of its HEAO 4-in-1 high chairs due to significant safety concerns. These high chairs, available in various colors including black, blue, gold, green, gray, pink, and red, are equipped with adjustable height, multiple recline positions, a footrest, a detachable tray, and four wheels with locks. The brand name 'HEAO' can be found on the seat cushion's head support and on the tray's front. A label indicating 'Max Lead Int'l Ltd. 3113 Glenfield Ave., Dallas, TX 75233 (302) 448-4207' is sewn into the back of the seat cushion.
recalls.Title: Brandline Issues Recall for HEAO 4-in-1 High Chairs Due to Suffocation, Entrapment, and Laceration Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should cease using the recalled high chairs immediately and reach out to Brandline at 302-261-5366, available Monday through Friday from 10 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET, or via email at maxlead.us@gmail.com for further instructions on disposal and refunds.

Images.Caption: Recalled HEAO High Chair with static wheels
Recalled HEAO High Chair with rotating wheels

Injuries.Name: The firm is aware of one incident that resulted in a laceration to a child's finger that required medical attention.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Amazon.com from November 2022 to September 2023 for approximately $170.

Importers.Name: Max Lead International Ltd., dba Brandline, of Dallas, Texas

Hazards.Name: Suffocation, entrapment, and laceration risks due to design flaws and safety standard violations.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the high chairs and contact Brandline for disposal instructions and a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Brandline recalls HEAO 4-in-1 high chairs due to serious safety hazards. Contact Brandline for refunds and disposal instructions.
